entries.title: Roadmap & decisions
entries.comment: Projects and decisions live here. Open one to see its child entries.

entries.title: How dispatch works
entries.comment: Every entry is one node: it has a title and a comment, and a TYPE that decides its content — a note, a wireframe, a sheet, a doc, or a sketch (each keeps its own data). Nodes relate through the relations table, so ONE entry can live under many parents.

entries.title: Store & money decisions
entries.comment: Decisions, one at a time, each with a recommendation.

entries.title: Store & pricing decisions
entries.comment: Walk me through store + pricing one at a time, simply, with a recommendation for each.

entries.title: Finish the desktop bridge
entries.comment: Rebuild the Mac app on the new workspace and finish the M2 cutover.
